title: Ambivalent Enmity in Transcultural Contexts
further_info: Recommended Reading Nandy, Ashis. 1983. Intimate Enemy: Loss and Recovery of Self under Colonialism. Delhi: Oxford University Press. Edelman, Murray. 1988. Constructing the Political Spectacle. Chicago: University Of Chicago Press. Bauman, Zygmunt. 1998. “Allosemitism: Premodern, Modern, Postmodern.” In Modernity, Culture and “the Jew,” eds. Bryan Cheyette and Laura Marcus. Cambridge: Polity Press, 143–56 For the applicability of the course in different degree programs, please refer to the information under ‘Module / Applicability in Degree Programs’ in the Annotated Course Catalog (KVV) of the HfJS.
